name: Backlog Health
description: Backlog size, average age and stale percentage by project
query: WITH latest AS (SELECT project_key, MAX(full_date) AS full_date FROM metrics.v_facts WHERE calc_code IN ('backlog_size', 'backlog_avg_age_days', 'backlog_stale_pct') [[ AND project_key = {{project_key}} ]] [[ AND full_date >= {{date_from}} ]] [[ AND full_date <= {{date_to}} ]] GROUP BY project_key), scoped AS (SELECT f.project_key, f.calc_code, f.value FROM metrics.v_facts f JOIN latest l ON l.project_key = f.project_key AND l.full_date = f.full_date WHERE f.calc_code IN ('backlog_size', 'backlog_avg_age_days', 'backlog_stale_pct')) SELECT project_key, MAX(CASE WHEN calc_code = 'backlog_size' THEN value END) AS total_backlog_size, MAX(CASE WHEN calc_code = 'backlog_avg_age_days' THEN value END) AS avg_age_days, MAX(CASE WHEN calc_code = 'backlog_stale_pct' THEN value END) AS stale_percentage FROM scoped GROUP BY project_key ORDER BY total_backlog_size DESC NULLS LAST
